group.name: Substrate lifecycle-status bookkeeping drift (stored buckets lag completed reality; standing validator warnings)

statement: Issues-sibling parity (FGAP-098 / TASK-068, spawned by the user's 2026-06-18 mid-turn requirement) has every leg of its proposed resolution live in the substrate since 2026-06-19 — task_addresses_issue and issue_relates_to_issue relation types, the task-completed-issue-resolved invariant, the issues next_ranked entry, the additive issues-schema lifecycle fields, the issues-by-status/priority lenses, and the catalog back-port (merge 3f6a9a7c, live-config apply c18d4ffe) — yet at HEAD TASK-068 still stores `planned` (the 2026-07-02 user-directed status-honesty flip, never resumed) and FGAP-098 still stores `identified` with no closure record: the closure loop (adversarial verification against the filed acceptance criteria -> complete-task -> gap closure) never ran, so the substrate presents already-enacted parity as open next-work.
action: Run the closure loop for TASK-068 against its filed acceptance_criteria: a separate adversarial verification of each criterion against the live substrate/catalog, file the verification item, complete-task through the sanctioned pipeline, and close FGAP-098 with a closure record — or, if any criterion is verified genuinely unmet, surface that residue as TASK-068's real remaining work instead of leaving the whole unit stored planned/identified.

in: .context/config.json parity vocabulary (already live: relation types, invariant, next_ranked issues)
out: re-implementing the parity vocabulary (already live in config, catalog, and schemas)

verify: TASK-068 leaves `planned` through the sanctioned pipeline with a filed verification item; FGAP-098 status flips off `identified` with a closure record; currentState/nextActions no longer ranks the already-enacted parity unit as open next-work (or the verified-unmet criterion residue is filed as its own tracked work).

history.note: Slice-A mid-turn sweep: traced the user's 2026-06-18T22:39:57Z mid-turn question forward — FGAP-098 filed 2026-06-19 embedding the user-verbatim requirement, vocabulary merged (3f6a9a7c) and applied live (c18d4ffe) same day, TASK-068 flipped in-progress->planned 2026-07-02 for status honesty (c8ced233) and never resumed; no existing atom names FGAP-098 or TASK-068.
